glosses.vi: có thể thấy; dễ nhận thấy
glosses.hi: दिखाई देने वाला; ध्यान देने योग्य
glosses.ja: 目に見える; 目立つ

translations.pt: A mancha ainda dá para ver.
translations.nl: De vlek is nog te zien.
translations.hi: दाग अभी भी दिख रहा है.

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘still’; modifies the predicate.
Adjective ‘visible’ used predicatively as complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Ohne Brille ist die Tafel kaum sichtbar.
sentences.reading: /ˈoːnə ˈbrɪlə ɪst diː ˈtaːfl̩ kaʊ̯m ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ohne Brille ist die Tafel kaum sichtbar.
translations.ipa: /ˈoːnə ˈbrɪlə ɪst diː ˈtaːfl̩ kaʊ̯m ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/
translations.en: Without glasses, the board is hardly visible.
translations.es: Sin gafas, la pizarra casi no se ve.
translations.fr: Sans lunettes, le tableau est à peine visible.
translations.it: Senza occhiali, la lavagna si vede a malapena.
translations.ko: 안경 없이는 칠판이 잘 안 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 不戴眼镜，黑板几乎看不清。
translations.yue: 冇戴眼鏡就幾乎睇唔到黑板。
translations.ru: Без очков доску почти не видно.
translations.pt: Sem óculos, o quadro quase não dá para ver.
translations.he: בלי משקפיים בקושי רואים את הלוח.
translations.vi: Không đeo kính thì gần như không thấy bảng.
translations.ar: من دون نظارات، السبورة بالكاد تُرى.
translations.nl: Zonder bril is het bord amper te zien.
translations.hu: Szemüveg nélkül alig lehet látni a táblát.
translations.hi: बिना चश्मे के बोर्ड मुश्किल से दिखता है.
translations.el: Χωρίς γυαλιά ο πίνακας μόλις που φαίνεται.
translations.nb: Uten briller er tavla knapt synlig.
translations.id: Tanpa kacamata, papan tulis hampir tidak terlihat.
translations.ro: Fără ochelari, tabla abia se vede.
translations.cs: Bez brýlí je tabule sotva vidět.
translations.da: Uden briller kan man næsten ikke se tavlen.
translations.fi: Ilman silmälaseja taulu näkyy tuskin lainkaan.
translations.ja: 眼鏡がないと黒板がほとんど見えない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition ‘without’ governing the accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘ohne’.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Definite article in nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Degree adverb meaning ‘hardly’; modifies the predicative adjective.
Adjective ‘visible’ used predicatively as complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Im Nebel bleibt das Schild kaum sichtbar.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈneːbl̩ blaɪ̯pt das ʃɪlt kaʊ̯m ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Im Nebel bleibt das Schild kaum sichtbar.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈneːbl̩ blaɪ̯pt das ʃɪlt kaʊ̯m ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/
translations.en: In the fog, the sign stays barely visible.
translations.es: Con la niebla, la señal apenas se ve.
translations.fr: Dans le brouillard, le panneau est à peine visible.
translations.it: Con la nebbia, il cartello si vede a malapena.
translations.ko: 안개 속에서는 표지판이 거의 안 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在雾中，路牌几乎看不见。
translations.yue: 有霧嗰陣，路牌幾乎睇唔到。
translations.pt: Com neblina, a placa mal dá para ver.
translations.vi: Trong sương mù, biển báo hầu như không thấy.
translations.ar: في الضباب تكون اللافتة بالكاد مرئية.
translations.nl: In de mist is het bord amper te zien.
translations.hi: कोहरे में साइनबोर्ड मुश्किल से दिखता है.
translations.el: Στην ομίχλη, η πινακίδα μόλις που φαίνεται.
translations.nb: I tåka er skiltet knapt synlig.
translations.id: Di tengah kabut, rambu itu nyaris tidak terlihat.
translations.ro: În ceață, indicatorul abia se vede.
translations.cs: V mlze je značka sotva vidět.
translations.da: I tågen er skiltet knap synligt.
translations.ja: 霧の中では標識がほとんど見えない。

tokens.explanation: Fused form of ‘in dem’; preposition introducing a locative dative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘in’.
Finite lexical verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a predicative complement (‘sichtbar’).
Definite article in nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Degree adverb meaning ‘hardly’; modifies the predicative adjective.
Adjective ‘visible’ used predicatively as complement of the verb ‘bleiben’.

sentences.target: Auf dem Foto bin ich gut sichtbar.
sentences.reading: /aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto bɪn ɪç guːt ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Auf dem Foto bin ich gut sichtbar.
translations.ipa: /aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto bɪn ɪç guːt ˈzɪçtbaːɐ̯/
translations.en: In the photo, I'm clearly visible.
translations.es: En la foto se me ve bien.
translations.fr: Sur la photo, on me voit bien.
translations.it: Nella foto mi si vede bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 照片里能清楚地看到我。
translations.yue: 張相入面見到我好清楚。
translations.pt: Na foto dá para me ver bem.
translations.nl: Op de foto ben ik goed te zien.
translations.hi: फोटो में मैं साफ दिख रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: På bildet er jeg godt synlig.
translations.da: På billedet kan man tydeligt se mig.
translations.ja: 写真では私ははっきり写っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition ‘on’; here locative, governing the dative; heads a prepositional phrase.
Definite article in dative neuter singular; determiner of the noun ‘Foto’.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘auf’.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 1st person singular present; links the subject ‘ich’ to the predicative adjective.
Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Degree adverb meaning ‘well’; modifies the predicative adjective.
Adjective ‘visible’ used predicatively as complement of the copula.

Sur la photo, on me voit bien.
